title: Safety and immunogenicity of an adjuvant-free peptide vaccine targeting IL-17A: Phase 1 randomized controlled trial.
snippet: We investigated whether a peptide vaccine (FPP003) composed of B cell epitope for IL-17A and T cell epitope (AJP001) with innate immune activation could induce the antibody production without adjuvants. The safety and immune response of FPP003 were evaluated in a double-blind trial. Twenty healthy participants received either a low or high dose of FPP003 (=...
